query: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS loginMethod VARCHAR(64) NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerType VARCHAR(64) NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userType VARCHAR(64) NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSignedIn TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
